deep_dive.title: Agentic Clustering: Controllable Text Taxonomies via Multi-Agent Refinement
deep_dive.abstract: Recent text-clustering methods use large language models to propose a cluster taxonomy from a corpus and then assign each text to it. These pipelines are fundamentally programmatic: the sequence of LLM calls and the rules for stopping, merging, and splitting clusters are fixed in code in advance, so they generalise poorly across corpora of different structure and cannot easily incorporate user-supplied constraints such as a target cluster count or a clustering intent. We propose an agentic alternative in which an orchestrator LLM inspects the state of the discovery process at each step and dispatches one of a small set of specialised agents - proposer, synthesizer, auditor, investigator, and critic - adapting the pipeline to the corpus rather than executing a fixed one. On seven public text-clustering benchmarks the method achieves state-of-the-art performance, beating the strongest prior LLM baseline by up to 32% in ARI.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Uses LLM agents for active clustering refinement
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用LLM智能体进行主动聚类优化
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用LLM智能体进行主动聚类优化
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用LLM智能体进行主动聚类优化
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Agentic Clustering uses an orchestrator LLM and specialized agents to adaptively refine text cluster taxonomies, replacing rigid programmatic pipelines with active, corpus-aware clustering.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对现有文本聚类方法中LLM流水线固定、泛化性差的问题，本文提出Agentic Clustering，采用一个编排器LLM在每一步检查聚类状态，并分派提议者、合成者、审计者、调查者和批评者等专业智能体，动态调整聚类结构。该方法能自动适应不同语料库的结构，并允许用户设定聚类数量或意图等约束。实验表明，该方法在多种文本数据集上优于固定流水线，实现了更可控、更准确的聚类，体现了大语言模型在主动聚类中的最新进展。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对现有文本聚类方法中LLM流水线固定、泛化性差的问题，本文提出Agentic Clustering，采用一个编排器LLM在每一步检查聚类状态，并分派提议者、合成者、审计者、调查者和批评者等专业智能体，动态调整聚类结构。该方法能自动适应不同语料库的结构，并允许用户设定聚类数量或意图等约束。实验表明，该方法在多种文本数据集上优于固定流水线，实现了更可控、更准确的聚类，体现了大语言模型在主动聚类中的最新进展。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: recent advances in active clustering with large language models
